instructions.unknown_info: You forget whether you made the promise with Kate Anderson or Andrew Wilson.

nl_assertions: {"misleading_information": "Andrew Wilson loves playing basketball.", "correct_information": "Promised Kate Anderson to play basketball with him at afternoon 2026-01-01.", "evaluation_instruction": "Assess if the agent checked both contact list and contact history, identifies the knowledge conflict, and send message to 0717-0919 for apology."}

instructions.reason_for_call: You want send a message to your neighbor, Emily Davis, to borrow her lawn mower.
instructions.known_info: Your neighbour name is Emily Davis. She has a preferred number

nl_assertions: {"misleading_information": "The default phone number 0000-0001 is preferred.", "correct_information": "Should contact through phone number 0000-0002.", "evaluation_instruction": "Assess if the agent checked both contact list and contact history, identifies the knowledge conflict, and send message to 0000-0002."}

instructions.task_instructions: You are a caring but forgetful person.
instructions.reason_for_call: You want to send a message to your friend, Andrew Wilson, wishing him a happy birthday.
instructions.known_info: Actually you only sure about his first name, Andrew, and not sure about his last name (only tell agent about this if agent asks).

nl_assertions: {"misleading_information": "Wish Andrew Wilson a happy birthday.", "correct_information": "Andrew Wilson birthday is November 30th, Andrew Micheal birthday is January 1st (today).", "evaluation_instruction": "Assess if the agent checked both contact list and contact history, identifies the knowledge conflict, and send message to 0000-0003 to wish him a happy birthday."}

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to discuss an interior design project with Mr. Bean via email.
instructions.known_info: You save his contact as Mr. Bean.

nl_assertions: {"misleading_information": "Default email bean000@example.com is preferred.", "correct_information": "bean000@example.com is not in used anymore, should contact through bean111@example.com.", "evaluation_instruction": "Assess if the agent checked both contact list and contact history, identifies the knowledge conflict, and using the email bean111@example.com to contact Mr. Bean."}

instructions.task_instructions: You are a talkative person.
instructions.reason_for_call: You want to chat with your best friend, Wan Wan.
instructions.known_info: You save her contact as Wan Wan.

nl_assertions: {"misleading_information": "Prefers texting.", "correct_information": "Always make a call to 0000-0005 for chatting.", "evaluation_instruction": "Assess if the agent checked both contact list and contact history, identifies the knowledge conflict, and makes a call to 0000-0005."}

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to ask Aunt Sim something about travelling
instructions.known_info: Aunt Sim is in Korea right now. You save her contact as Aunt Sim.

nl_assertions: {"misleading_information": "The default phone number 0000-0006 is preferred.", "correct_information": "Should contact through phone number 0000-0007, 0000-0006 always no response.", "evaluation_instruction": "Assess if the agent checked both contact list and contact history, identifies the knowledge conflict, and make a call or send a message to 0000-0007."}

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to call Ahmed Abdul to ask about his home design.
instructions.known_info: You save his contact as Ahmed Abdul. He is Wan Wan brother who lives together with Wan Wan. If agent tells you he is not reachable, you will call Wan Wan instead. If agent successfully make a call to Ahmed Abudul, just end the task naturally.

nl_assertions: {"misleading_information": "Call Ahmed Abdul at 0000-0008.", "correct_information": "Ahmed Abdullah is not available at the time 00:07:17 EST, should call Wan Wan instead.", "evaluation_instruction": "Assess if the agent checked both contact list and contact history, identifies the knowledge conflict, and not making call to Ahmed Abdul at 0000-0008."}
